expectations.text: The project uses Java version 25 and Spring Boot version 4.1.0 or higher in pom.xml.
expectations.evidence: pom.xml is configured with Spring Boot parent version 4.1.0 and <java.version>25</java.version>.

expectations.text: Maven Wrapper files (.mvn directory, mvnw, and mvnw.cmd) exist in the root of the project.
expectations.evidence: Root directory includes the .mvn folder, mvnw and mvnw.cmd executable scripts.

expectations.text: The UI structure includes Thymeleaf templates layouts/base.html, fragments/header.html, and fragments/footer.html.
expectations.evidence: templates folder contains templates/layouts/base.html, templates/fragments/header.html, and templates/fragments/footer.html.

expectations.text: The Thymeleaf views utilize semantic HTML5 elements including header, main, and footer.
expectations.evidence: base.html contains HTML5 semantic tags <header>, <main>, and <footer> in its layout structure.

expectations.text: The BookDto is defined as a record and does not contain sensitive fields (password, createdAt, updatedAt, createAt, updateAt).
expectations.evidence: BookDto.java defines BookDto as a record with fields 'id', 'title', 'author', 'isbn', 'price', and 'description'. Sensitive fields (password, createdAt, updatedAt) are omitted.

expectations.text: A BookMapper class exists to explicitly map between Book entity and BookDto in both directions.
expectations.evidence: BookMapper.java contains entityToDto(Book) and dtoToEntity(BookDto) mapping methods.

expectations.text: The repository layer extends JpaRepository for access.
expectations.evidence: BookRepository.java is an interface extending JpaRepository<Book, Long>.

suggestions.reason: An assertion should check if the base package matches 'com.andres.course.agy.springboot.bookstore.app' specifically. Currently, baseline uses com.bookstore and passes package base tests.

eval_feedback.overall: The evaluation checks structure but missing verification of customized packages.
